title: Thread Spin — parse %thread-spin directives and create canonical thread artifacts
summary: Substrate's canonical procedure for spinning a new thread record. Parses operator-issued %thread-spin directives, validates the opener contract (WHO / ORG / SCOPE / GOAL / DONE-WHEN), canonicalizes owner metadata, builds a deterministic slug from GOAL, writes the canonical thread state files (thread.json + summary + moments JSONL + contributions JSONL), and updates the substrate's thread index. Keeps Discord-side thread creation as a separate downstream step to avoid coupling the canonical persistence to room-side state.

axioms.title: Opener contract is required
axioms.statement: Thread spin REQUIRES five fields: WHO, ORG, SCOPE, GOAL, DONE-WHEN. If any are missing, stop and ask for exactly the missing fields — do not infer them.
axioms.rationale: Threads are durable substrate artifacts that other agents read. Missing opener fields produce ambiguous threads that downstream agents cannot reliably consume. The five required fields are the minimal viable contract for thread legibility.
obligations: Halt thread creation if any required field is absent
Echo back exactly which fields are missing — operator should not have to compare against schema
Never silently default missing required fields

axioms.title: Slug is deterministic from GOAL
axioms.statement: The thread slug is derived from GOAL via kebab-case + short stable token budget + short hash suffix when collisions are possible. Same GOAL produces same slug barring collision.
axioms.rationale: Deterministic slugs enable cross-agent thread reference without coordination. LinkRef-by-slug lookups stay stable; thread retrieval doesn't depend on who created the thread or when.
obligations: Budget the slug short for legibility
Append hash suffix only when collision detected

axioms.title: Canonical state lives on disk before any room-side action
axioms.statement: Substrate's filesystem is the canonical thread state. Discord/room-side thread creation is a separate downstream step that updates substrate state after-the-fact, not before-the-fact.
axioms.rationale: Coupling thread creation to room-side state would make threads dependent on third-party-service availability and would conflate substrate's canonical record with ephemeral room IDs. Substrate-first writes preserve sovereignty per the local-model-doctrine.
obligations: Set discord.threadId: pending until the room exists
Update via thread.discord.thread-created event after IDs are known

axioms.title: Beads created from thread flow carry sourceThreadId + sourceBeatId
axioms.statement: When a thread beat produces a concrete open-work bead, the bead must carry sourceThreadId and sourceBeatId so the agenda artifact references the exact thread moment that produced it.
axioms.rationale: Without provenance, beads become orphan work-units; the substrate cannot reconstruct which thread decision spawned them. Per [[bead-vs-thread-vs-beat-shapes]] beads carry sourceType='thread-beat' + sourceThreadId + sourceBeatId.
obligations: Bead.sourceThreadId set to the spawning thread's slug
Bead.sourceBeatId set to the specific beat id

triggers.label: %thread-spin directive in operator chat
triggers.details: Any operator message containing '%thread-spin' (or a line beginning with it) in a context where a new thread is intended.

triggers.label: New intent or objective starts
triggers.details: Substrate detects that a new intent or thread objective is starting and the existing thread should not continue. Owner / scope / lane / risk-posture changes also fire this trigger.

triggers.label: Durable thread handoff required
triggers.details: A handoff artifact is needed on disk so a different agent can pick up the thread context.

steps.title: Parse %thread-spin directive + fields from current message context
instructions: Extract WHO / ORG / SCOPE / GOAL / DONE-WHEN from the message
Capture optional fields: LANE / CONTEXT / OPEN-QUESTIONS / NEXT / STATE
If any required field is missing, halt and ask

steps.title: Canonicalize owner + profile metadata from WHO
instructions: Resolve WHO to substrate canonical owner slug
Validate profile metadata exists for the owner
If unknown owner, confirm before creating files

steps.title: Build deterministic slug from GOAL
instructions: kebab-case the GOAL phrase
Apply short token budget
Append short hash suffix if collision detected

steps.title: Write canonical thread state files
instructions: Create directory at private/universal/substrate/collectives/todo3/private/threads/open/<slug>/
Write thread.json with bucket=open, owners=[<owner>], discord.threadId=pending
Write <slug>.summary.thread.clia.json with the opener contract
Initialize <slug>.moments.thread.clia.jsonl with thread.created and an initial thread.beat (goal + done-when + next)
Initialize <slug>.contributions.thread.clia.jsonl with at least one contribution record

steps.title: Optionally add thread.evidence.added moments for evidence references
instructions: If evidence paths or URLs were provided in CONTEXT, append thread.evidence.added moments
Preserve deterministic ordering

steps.title: Update index.threads.clia.json entry
instructions: Update the thread index file at private/universal/substrate/collectives/todo3/private/threads/index.threads.clia.json
Preserve existing index entries

steps.title: Optionally regenerate thread DocC via swift-triage-cli
instructions: Build swift-triage-cli if not built: swift build -c release at the substrate-canonical path
Run: swift-triage-cli triage docc-site rebuild with the routing map + docc-root paths

outcomes.label: Thread directory created on disk under todo3/private/threads/open/<slug>/
outcomes.details: All four canonical files present: thread.json, <slug>.summary.thread.clia.json, <slug>.moments.thread.clia.jsonl, <slug>.contributions.thread.clia.jsonl.

outcomes.label: Initial thread.beat captured
outcomes.details: First beat records the opening direction (goal + done-when + next) so downstream agents can read the thread's intent without re-asking.

outcomes.label: Substrate-internal canonical state — Discord-side state pending
outcomes.details: discord.threadId remains 'pending' until the Discord room thread is created and ID is known. Downstream thread.discord.thread-created event updates it later.

outcomes.label: Thread index updated
outcomes.details: index.threads.clia.json reflects the new thread for cross-agent discoverability.
